name: Advocaat Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter or margarine until creamy.
2. Gradually add sugar and vanilla sugar, mixing continuously.
3. Incorporate egg yolks into the mixture.
4. Mix ground almonds with baking powder and fold in chocolate pieces.
5. Add rum and brandy to the batter.
6. Whisk egg whites until stiff peaks form; gently fold into the batter.
7. Place batter in a greased round cake pan lined with parchment paper.
8. Bake at 175°C for about 60 minutes or until set.
9. Allow cooling completely before removing from the pan.
10. Whip cream until stiff and spread over the cooled cake.
11. Pour egg liquer evenly over the cream layer.
12. Decorate with additional whipped cream and sprinkle with chocolate crumbs.
(Note: The original recipe required two envelopes of cream hardener, which is not specified here.)
